title: Introduction to Internet of Things (IoT) Quiz
description: Basic concepts of IoT including architecture, components, communication models, challenges, and applications.
heading: IoT Fundamentals Practice Quiz

questions.question: What does IoT stand for?
Which layer of the IoT architecture is responsible for collecting data from sensors and actuators?
Which of the following is NOT a common communication protocol used in IoT?
What is the primary role of actuators in an IoT system?
options: Perform an action or physical task

questions.question: Which IoT communication model involves direct device-to-device interaction without a central server?
What does MQTT use as its underlying transport protocol?
Which of the following is a major security concern in IoT?
What is a 'thing' in the context of IoT?
options: Any physical object with embedded sensors and connectivity

questions.question: Which IoT protocol is designed specifically for RESTful interactions on constrained nodes and networks?
Which of the following is an example of an IoT application in smart homes?
What does a gateway do in IoT architecture?
options: Acts as a bridge between sensors and the cloud/network

questions.question: Which characteristic is a major challenge for IoT device design?
In the Device-to-Cloud communication model, how do devices send data?
What is 'edge computing' in IoT?
options: Computing done only in a central cloud
Processing data near the source of data generation
Storing data on a USB drive

questions.question: Which wireless technology is most suitable for low-power, long-range IoT applications like smart agriculture?
Which of the following best describes RFID in IoT?
options: A technology for wireless identification and tracking using tags

questions.question: What does interoperability mean in the context of IoT?
options: All devices using the same operating system
Ability of different IoT systems and devices to work together
Devices not connecting to the internet
Only one brand of devices in a network

questions.question: Which of the following is a key benefit of IoT in industrial settings (IIoT)?
What is the primary function of a sensor in an IoT device?
options: Convert a physical quantity into an electrical signal

questions.question: Which layer of the IoT architecture typically handles data storage, processing, and analytics?
